ddls:
CREATE TABLE "uart_devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each UART device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the UART device */,
  "channels" INTEGER /* Number of channels supported by the device */,
  "fifo_bytes" INTEGER /* Size of FIFO buffer in bytes */,
  "irda_support" INTEGER /* Indicates if the device supports IrDA */,
  "modem_control_pins" INTEGER /* Number of modem control pins */,
  "general_purpose_outputs" INTEGER /* Number of general-purpose outputs */,
  "fifo_interrupt_trigger_levels" TEXT /* FIFO interrupt trigger levels supported by the device */,
  "sw_flow_control" INTEGER /* Indicates if the device supports software flow control (Xon, Xoff) */,
  "data_bus_interface" TEXT /* Type of data bus interface (e.g., Intel) */,
  "package_type" TEXT /* Package type of the device (e.g., PLCC44, LQFP48) */,
  "part_number" TEXT /* Part number of the device */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the device */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the device */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the device */,
  "discontinued" INTEGER /* Indicates if the device is discontinued */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the UART device */,
  "stock_level" INTEGER /* Current stock level of the device */,
  "warehouse_location" TEXT /* Location of the warehouse where the device is stored */,
  "bin_number" TEXT /* Bin number where the device is stored */,
  "storage_conditions" TEXT /* Storage conditions (e.g., temperature, humidity) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES uart_devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale transaction */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the UART device sold */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of devices sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "customer_address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "sale_channel" TEXT /* Channel through which the sale was made (e.g., online, offline) */,
  "sale_price" TEXT /* Price of the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES uart_devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "procurement" (
  "procurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each procurement transaction */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the UART device procured */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of devices procured */,
  "procurement_date" TEXT /* Date of the procurement */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "supplier_address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "procurement_price" TEXT /* Price of the procurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("procurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_procurement_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES uart_devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_lifecycle" (
  "lifecycle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lifecycle record */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the UART device */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the device */,
  "revision_date" TEXT /* Date of the revision */,
  "revision_notes" TEXT /* Notes on the revision */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the device (e.g., active, deprecated, discontinued) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lifecycle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_lifecycle_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES uart_devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the UART device the document belongs to */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., datasheet, user manual) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the file in bytes */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the file (e.g., PDF, ZIP) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES uart_devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the UART device */,
  "read_permission" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user has read permission for the device */,
  "write_permission" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user has write permission for the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES uart_devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "supply_chain" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the UART device */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "supplier_address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_supply_chain_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES uart_devices ("device_id")
)
